title: Conflict-Free Cache Color Selection
strategies: base-5 two-digit set (reference baseline): integers whose base-5 digits are only 0/1 (3AP-free, sparse)
base-4 two-digit set: denser than base-5, still 3AP-free by no-carry argument
base-3 two-digit / Stanley-greedy set: densest simple digit construction (~n^0.63)
Behrend-style sphere construction or search to exceed the base-3 density (open-ended headroom)
